title: CT4 7BA, Synergy Asset Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/FB3602HU/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Synergy Asset Services Limited   Installation name: Merton Farm   Permit number: EPR/FB3602HU/V002   "
